title: Menu Class
description: Represents a menu that displays menus and sub-menus.

constructors.name: constructor(element?: HTMLElement)
constructors.description: Initializes a new instance of the Menu class from element.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create Menu control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementChildren: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root elementChildren of the control.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: childrenLocations: number[]
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement locations for all sub-item dropdowns.

properties.name: childrenOption: ShowAtOption
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement option for all sub-item dropdowns.
properties.remarks: The default value is <mark>{ distance: -1, distanceToContainer: 1 }</mark>.

properties.name: childrenDirection: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the input direction of children for all sub-item. This value does not determine the children layout; rather, it dictates how user input is handled.

properties.name: childrenIntersectEnabled: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the intersection overlay is enabled for all sub-item dropdowns.

properties.name: rootChildrenLocations: number[]
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement locations for all root-item dropdowns.

properties.name: rootChildrenOption: ShowAtOption
properties.description: Gets or sets the placement option for all root-item dropdowns.
properties.remarks: The default value is <mark>{ distance: -1, distanceToContainer: 1 }</mark>.

properties.name: rootChildrenDirection: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the input direction of children for all root-item dropdown. This value does not determine the children layout; rather, it dictates how user input is handled.

properties.name: rootChildrenIntersectEnabled: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the intersection overlay is enabled for all sub-item dropdowns.

properties.name: contextMenu: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the menu is a context menu.
remarks: When sets to true, the menu element class will have "CONTEXTMENU"

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new menu item, a separator, or a tree of items to the menu.

overloads.name: add(modifiers: MenuItemAddModifiers | string): MenuItem
overloads.description: Adds a separator, or a tree of items to the menu.

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description: The modifiers from which the menu item will be created.

returns.description: Returns the newly created MenuItem that was added to the menu.

overloads.remarks: If the parameter is '--', a separator will be added to the menu.

overloads.name: add(item: MenuItem): void

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The MenuItem to be added to the menu.

overloads.remarks: This method removes the menu from its current parent, if one exists, before adding it to the new parent.

methods.name: showAsContextMenuAt
methods.description: Shows the menu as a context menu. The menu receives focus immediately after being shown.

overloads.name: showAsContextMenuAt(at: PointLike, locations: number[], option?: ShowAtOption): ShowAtResult
overloads.description: Shows the menu at the coordinates relative to the document.

overloads.name: showAsContextMenuAt(at: HTMLElement, locations: number[], option?: ShowAtOption): ShowAtResult
overloads.description: Shows the menu anchored to the other element.

methods.name: getActiveItem(): MenuItem | undefined
methods.description: Gets the active child item in the menu.
methods.returns: Returns <mark>undefined</mark> if no active menu exists.

methods.name: getDeepestActive(): MenuItem | undefined
methods.description: Gets the most deeply nested active menu in the menu tree.
methods.returns: Returns <mark>undefined</mark> if no active menu exists.

events.name: menuclick
events.description: The menu's click event fires when a user clicks a menu item.

static_fields.name: CHILDREN_VISIBLE_DELAY: number
static_fields.description: Gets or sets the global visibility delay for child dropdowns.
